title: Gooey Spanish Horseradish Wrap
description: A flavorful and spicy Spanish-inspired wrap filled with gooey cheese and savory horseradish sauce, perfect for a quick and satisfying lunch or dinner.
instructions: Place a large flour tortilla on a flat surface.
Spread 1 tablespoon of olive oil evenly over the tortilla, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Sprinkle 1/4 teaspoon of garlic powder and 1/4 teaspoon of paprika evenly over the tortilla, within the oil border.
Top the tortilla with sliced chorizo, sliced red onion, sliced bell peppers, and chopped fresh cilantro, leaving a small border around the edges to allow for folding.
Spread 2 tablespoons of horseradish sauce evenly over the filling, within the tortilla edges.
Place 4 ounces of sliced Manchego cheese on top of the filling.
Fold the 1-inch border of the tortilla over the filling, and then fold in the sides, creating a compact wrap.
Place the wrap seam-side down in a large skillet or griddle over medium heat, and cook for 2-3 minutes or until the cheese is melted and the tortilla is crispy.
Carefully flip the wrap over and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the other side is also crispy and the cheese is melted.
Remove the wrap from the skillet and let it cool for a minute before slicing and serving.
Slice the wrap into 4-6 equal pieces, depending on desired size.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
Consider serving with a side of mixed greens or a simple green salad for a more substantial meal.
